mv Vishva Malhar  (56k Grd - Grb, Blt\'11)         Gangavaram,      Ec India         28 - 30 Dec
mv Vishva Vijeta      (56k Grd/Grb, Blt\'11)         Krishnapatnam,  Ec India    06 - 08 Jan
- Dir. Headowners Smax Any TCT Incl. Coastal
MV VISHVA MALHAR
SDBC Indian Flag Blt Aug
2011
56,616.05
sdwt on
12.8
mtrs
Loa 189.99/ Beam 32.26 m
grt/nrt 33032/19231
H/A 5/5
Cranes 4x36 mts on hook duty
28t on grab duty
4 x 12 cbm grabs
Grain 2,407,150.5 cbft
Speed / Consumptions
ABT 12.5 K ON ABT 23.5 MTS IFO 380 CST + ABT 0.1 MT MDO (BALLAST)
ABT 12.5 K ON ABT 25 MTS IFO 380 CST + ABT 0.1 MT MDO (LADEN)
PORT IDLE : ABT 3.5 MT IFO 380 CST + ABT 0.1 MT MDO
PORT WORKING : ABT 5.5 MT IFO 380 CST + ABT 0.1 MT MDO
All Details About
SPEED/CONSUMPTION UNDER GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS UP TO WIND FORCE 4 OF BEAUFORT SCALE (11-16 KNOTS)
AND DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 (DEFINED IN THIS CHARTER PARTY TO BE A COMBINED WAVE HEIGHT AND SWELL OF UP TO MAXIMUM 1.25M)
WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENT  AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL. THE EFFECT OF THE POSITIVE CURRENTS NOT TO BE DEBITED AGAINST THE VESSEL .
A DAY TO BE CONSIDERED GOOD WEATHER DAY ONLY IF THE GOOD WEATHER CONDITION PREVAIL FOR MORE THAN 12 HRS .
THE VESSEL IS ENTITLED TO USE ADDITIONAL MDO FOR MAIN ENGINE/GENERATOR ENGINES WHEN MANEUVERING IN NARROW/SHALLOW WATERS,
CANALS,  RIVERS, IN/OUT PORT, SHIFT OF GENERATOR ENGINE, OVERHAULING PISTON ETC, UNDER THE DIRECTION OF MASTER
==
